lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello.

lines.speaker: Worker
lines.text: Hey there!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You seem rather happy for a busy labourer with a bad case of spots.

lines.speaker: Worker
lines.text: Of course! These spots are the best thing since log rollers!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I really don't follow.

lines.speaker: Worker
lines.text: Well thanks to these spots, the city has been under quarantine. That means there's no goods coming in or out. No goods means we don't have any work to do!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: But aren't the spots intolerable?

lines.speaker: Worker
lines.text: I would take a dermatological irritation over back-breaking, mind-numbing labour any day!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Right... Okay then...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello.

lines.speaker: Worker
lines.text: Hey.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What's wrong?

lines.speaker: Worker
lines.text: The High Priest has determined that these spots aren't contagious. He's opened the city up again, which means we have to go back to work.

lines.speaker: Worker
lines.text: Now that all the plagues have been cured, we've had to go back to work.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Cheer up! Work can't be that bad.

lines.speaker: Worker
lines.text: You have no idea...

lines.speaker: Worker
lines.text: What are you doing?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I have this acne potion that I thought might clear up your spots?

lines.speaker: Worker
lines.text: What, so that I can get back to work?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So that you don't suffer needlessly?

lines.speaker: Worker
lines.text: I know your type, trying to ruin the small man's fun! I won't have it!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Look, I'm sorry. I only wanted to help you.

lines.speaker: Worker
lines.text: Clear off!
